text: Google Business Profile now ships scheduling and multi location publishing for Posts. If you run a chain or multi location brand, this is a real workflow upgrade. #LocalSEO #GoogleBusinessProfile #SmallBusiness

Uncomfortable 2026 local SEO truth. Google's AI Overviews pull from Business Profiles and favor professional photography. iPhone photos get skipped. Your camera roll is now an SEO input. #LocalSEO #SEO #AIOverviews
